name: Bavarian Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds beef arm pot roast (up to 4 lbs)
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6 to 8
Wipe roast well and trim off excess fat. Lightly rub the top of meat with oil.
Dust with salt, pepper, and ginger. Insert cloves in roast. Place apples and
onions in Crock-Pot and top with roast (cut roast in half, if necessary, to fit
easily). Pour in apple juice. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours or on
High for 5 to 6 hours.
Remove roast and apples to warm platter. Turn Crock-Pot to High setting. Make a
smooth paste of the flour and water; stir into Crock-Pot. Cover and cook until
thickened.
